title: Competitor Case Study
description: Extracted structure for a vendor customer-story / case-study page. Use with `firecrawl scrape --schema-file` on URLs like /case-studies/*, /customers/*.

customer_name.description: Name of the customer featured in the case study.

industry.description: Hospitality-relevant industry taxonomy. Use 'other' for non-hospitality verticals.

size_descriptor.description: Free-text descriptor if exact numbers not given (e.g., 'multi-unit operator', 'enterprise').

challenge.description: Problem / pain point that drove the customer to adopt the product. Usually a paragraph.

solution.description: How the product was deployed / which modules used.

results.description: Quantified outcomes claimed in the case study.

metric.description: The thing being measured (e.g., 'labor cost %', 'scheduling time', 'turnover rate').

improvement_pct.description: Percentage improvement if stated; negative values indicate reduction.

improvement_absolute.description: Absolute improvement in free text (e.g., 'saved 468 hours', 'added $447,000 to bottom line').

product_used.description: Specific products / modules referenced (e.g., ['R365 Scheduling', 'R365 Accounting']).

publication_date.description: ISO date the case study was published, if visible on page.
